description: _trim_context set to 900 chars (should be ~3500)

description: _numeric_magnitude_ok returns True when unit not found

description: is_healthy() caches result permanently (no TTL)

description: LRU cache race causes duplicate LLM calls under concurrency
notes: Locking/semaphore ordering wasteful under concurrent misses

description: company_requirement vs company_Requirement casing mismatch

description: _find_compliance_cols assumes triplet columns

description: Two parallel evaluation stacks (old MultiAgentEvaluator active)

description: Unpinned package versions

description: heuristic_rules missing UNIQUE(rule_type,pattern)

description: vendor_data lookup compares vendor_id against spec_id (wrong var)

description: 2-column PDFs not handled; block order scrambled

description: format_profiles index missing from _ensure_indexes

description: _HEURISTIC_EVALUATOR instantiated at import time (touches real DB)

description: Confidence calibration inverted for NO vs YES in some branches

description: Duplicate dict key in test fixture (linter)

description: Override actions not logged to audit_log

description: Loads entire compliance_matrix on every render (no pagination)

description: Upload_files writes chunks before size check; partial files left on disk

description: _update_progress commits on every pair (fsync storm)

description: Log message references eval_workers before assignment; concurrency/log mismatch

description: Keyword 'spec' overmatches (e.g., 'Inspection Aspects')

description: FormatProfile.from_dict mutates input dict via pop

description: default_model() called at import; evaluator gets stale model_name

description: ThreadPoolExecutor shares a single SQLite connection across threads (unsafe)
